questions.question: Describe the key differences between a social robot and a tele-bot in terms of their primary functions and capabilities. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the main characteristics of each type of robot

questions.question: Explain how a supertools system can be designed to work in harmony with human users, highlighting at least two key design considerations. (10 marks)
Compare and contrast the design principles underlying social robots and active appliances, justifying your answer with reference to at least one example of each. (20 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the technical and functional differences
